channel.title: Containers on Eclipse SW360
channel.description: Recent content in Containers on Eclipse SW360

item.title: Version 20.x with Containers
item.description:
Introduction

This guide details how to deploy SW360 version 20 using containers. The deployment stack is designed to be generic and can be run with either Docker (Compose V2) or Podman (podman-compose).

Using containers isolates the SW360 components and simplifies deploying the full stack (backend, frontend, databases, and authentication server) consistently.

Prerequisites

  • Docker (with Compose V2) OR Podman (with podman-compose)
  • Basic understanding of container networking and persistent volumes
  • Terraform OR OpenTofu (required only if configuring Keycloak via automation)

Architecture / Containers Utilized

The full-stack deployment consists of several interconnected containers:
